common.tagline: Preserve the stories of your loved ones

hero.title: Your family's stories — preserved forever
hero.subtitle: Gift your loved ones a talking memory book. Grandma or Grandpa tells their stories by voice, and we turn them into a beautiful book.

step1.title: You gift the book
step1.description: Order the memory book package and provide the storyteller's contact details.

step2.title: Weekly questions via WhatsApp
step2.description: Each week, Grandma or Grandpa receives a loving question via WhatsApp — and simply replies with a voice message.

step3.title: AI creates the text
step3.description: Our AI transforms each voice message into beautiful, readable stories — preserving the original voice.

step4.title: Your family book arrives
step4.description: In the end, you receive a premium printed book with QR codes to listen to the original recordings.

noApp.title: No app needed
noApp.description: The storyteller needs no app, no account, no password. Everything works through a simple link.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp integration
whatsapp.description: Questions arrive directly via WhatsApp — the channel seniors already know and use.

ai.title: AI-powered editing
ai.description: Our AI preserves the original tone and dialect while removing filler words and improving readability.

print.title: Premium printing
print.description: A premium hardcover book with QR codes that let you listen to the original voice.

family.title: For the whole family
family.description: Invite family members to add photos and experience the stories together.

privacy.title: GDPR compliant
privacy.description: All data is stored in the EU and processed according to the strictest privacy standards.

package.name: The Memory Book
package.description: Everything you need to preserve your family's stories forever.

items.question: Does Grandma/Grandpa need a smartphone?
items.answer: Yes, a smartphone with WhatsApp or SMS is sufficient. No app installation needed — everything works through a simple link in the browser.

items.question: What happens to the recordings?
items.answer: All recordings are securely stored in the EU and processed in GDPR compliance. You always have full control over the data.

items.question: Can I edit the texts?
items.answer: Yes! In the family dashboard, you can review, edit all AI-generated texts and add photos before the book is printed.

items.question: How long until the book is ready?
items.answer: The program runs for 52 weeks. But you can order the book at any time — even with fewer stories.

items.question: How much does an extra copy cost?
items.answer: Additional copies cost from €29 each — perfect as gifts for siblings or other family members.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your family dashboard

signup.subtitle: Create your account to get started

onboarding.title: Set up your storyteller

success.message: Your recording has been saved successfully. Your family will be so happy!

recording.consent: Your recording will be securely stored and used only for your family book.

expired.title: Link expired
expired.message: This recording link has expired. Please contact your family for a new link.

error.upload: The recording could not be uploaded. Please try again.
